description: Source weights for 2-source canonical blend (KTC + IDPTradeCalc only).

weight_rationale.KTC: Primary crowdsourced offense market source with the largest player pool.
weight_rationale.IDPTRADECALC: Primary IDP value source covering both offense and IDP players.

how_to_tune: Edit the 'sources' values below. Higher = more influence. Set to 0 to exclude. Re-run: python scripts/source_pull.py && python scripts/canonical_build.py
